name: IdsEdwComsnSchdTierDLoad

text.value: WITH source_data AS (SELECT COMSN_SCHD_TIER_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,COMSN_SCHD_ID,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DUR_EFF_DT_SK,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DURSTRTPERD_NO,PRM_FROM_THRSHLD_AMT,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,COMSN_SCHD_SK,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_AMT,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_CD,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_NM,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PCT,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PRMTHRUTHR_AMT,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_UNIQ_KEY,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALCMETH_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.T1_TMP_IdsEdwComsnSchdTierDLoad) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_D AS T USING source_data AS S ON T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_SK=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.SRC_SYS_CD=S.SRC_SYS_CD,T.COMSN_SCHD_ID=S.COMSN_SCHD_ID,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DUR_EFF_DT_SK=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DUR_EFF_DT_SK,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DURSTRTPERD_NO=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DURSTRTPERD_NO,T.PRM_FROM_THRSHLD_AMT=S.PRM_FROM_THRSHLD_AMT,T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,T.COMSN_SCHD_SK=S.COMSN_SCHD_SK,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_AMT=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_AMT,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_CD=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_CD,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_NM=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_NM,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PCT=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PCT,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PRMTHRUTHR_AMT=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PRMTHRUTHR_AMT,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_UNIQ_KEY=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_UNIQ_KEY,T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,T.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALCMETH_CD_SK=S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALCMETH_CD_SK WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (COMSN_SCHD_TIER_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,COMSN_SCHD_ID,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DUR_EFF_DT_SK,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DURSTRTPERD_NO,PRM_FROM_THRSHLD_AMT,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,COMSN_SCHD_SK,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_AMT,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_CD,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_NM,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PCT,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PRMTHRUTHR_AMT,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_UNIQ_KEY,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALCMETH_CD_SK) VALUES (S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_SK,S.SRC_SYS_CD,S.COMSN_SCHD_ID,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DUR_EFF_DT_SK,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_DURSTRTPERD_NO,S.PRM_FROM_THRSHLD_AMT,S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,S.COMSN_SCHD_SK,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_AMT,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_CD,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALC_METH_NM,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PCT,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_PRMTHRUTHR_AMT,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_UNIQ_KEY,S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,S.COMSN_SCHD_TIER_CALCMETH_CD_SK)
